speaker: speaker1
text: Hello ! How do I get more amenities ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry , sir . I'm not sure I understand .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm talking about the free stuff , like soap and shampoo .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I see . So , you're saying that you've already run out of your amenities .

speaker: speaker1
text: No , no . I've got plenty left .

speaker: speaker2
text: Now I'm confused again ! What is the problem ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What am I going to do about souvenirs ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I get it ! You want souvenirs !

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I've got enough soap for my use , but no extra soap for souvenirs .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sir , our souvenir shop carries all those items , and as a guest you get a discount .

speaker: speaker1
text: Please ! Free souvenirs are the only true souvenirs .

speaker: speaker2
text: I understand completely , sir . Housekeeping will bring you souvenirs in just a moment .
